ThermalBridgeCode.description: Code which indicates how the thermal bridge data has been recorded.

UserDefinedYValue.description: Global y-value for all thermal bridges in watts per square metre per kelvin; only if thermal bridge code is: user defined (global y-value).

CalculationReference.description: Reference to the details of the calculation of the global y-value; only if thermal bridging is user defined global y-value.

ThermalBridge.description: Various measurements for each thermal bridge that makes up a particular Building-Part.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
